+        "description": "Check for the issue in your harbor deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n cert-manager -l app=harbor\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=harbor -n cert-manager --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for errors related to: Performance Improvement Proposal for queries related with the Task Table"

Please describe.**\nWhen you have the Trivy scanner activated and want to perform one of the following operations:\n\n- List the artifacts of a project"

+        "title": "Apply the fix for Performance Improvement Proposal for queries related with th",
+        "description": "…trs_report_uuids\n\nThank you for contributing to Harbor!\n\n# Comprehensive Summary of your change\n\n# Issue being fixed\nFixes #(issue)\n\nPlease indicate you've done the following:\n```yaml\nwhen you run a query like just below the result of the EXPLAIN command indicates a seq_scan. It meens there's no use of the index  \"idx_task_extra_attrs_report_uuids\"  defined with task table.\n```"

+        "title": "Confirm Performance Improvement Proposal for queries relat is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=harbor -n cert-manager --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n cert-manager --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],

+      "summary": "The root cause is: …trs_report_uuids\n\nThank you for contributing to Harbor!\n\n# Comprehensive Summary of your change\n\n# Issue being fixed\nFixes #(issue)\n\nPlease indicate you've done the following:. This fixes the issue because it addresses the underlying problem that was causing the failure.",

+        "You might think the index will be used but it's not the case it's still a seq_scan.\r\n\r\nAfter applying the new index :"
